headline: Cotiviti Recognized by Everest Group as the Highest-Designated Leader for Market Impact in the 2026 Pre-payment Integrity Solutions PEAK Matrix® Assessment
summary: SALT LAKE CITY, July 01, 2026--Cotiviti has been recognized as the highest Leader for market impact by Everest Group's 2026 Pre-payment Integrity Solutions PEAK Matrix® Assessment.

headline: Everest Group: Generating An 11% Yield On A Large Notional Long Position
summary: Everest Group delivered outstanding Q1-2026 results, with net income of $653M and a 16.8% ROE, underscoring robust earnings power. Read the full analysis here.
